calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Petitioner: Mitchel Cole Dubin, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Female to Male, and the new birth certificate shall be issued reflecting the changes of Gender granted.
Decree signed in open court.
